nasb.text: Others were saying, “These are not the sayings of one demon-possessed. A demon cannot open the eyes of the blind, can he?”

esv.text: Others said, “These are not the words of one who is oppressed by a demon. Can a demon open the eyes of the blind?”

cnv.text: 另外有人說：“這話不是鬼附的人所說的。鬼怎能使瞎子的眼睛開了呢？”

ccb.text: 又有些人说：“被鬼附身的人不会说这种话的，鬼能医好瞎眼的人吗？”

csbs.text: 另有些人说：“这些话不是有鬼魔附身的人说的！鬼魔难道能开瞎子的眼睛吗？”
